description: The Scarface gang was a criminal gang possibly from the Netherlands, active in the 2000s and early 2010s. It consisted of two to six men and sometimes a woman, responsible for a series of violent armed robberies in Belgium, the Netherlands, Germany, and France. The gang was named after the character Tony Montana from the film Scarface. Four members were arrested in December 2011, while two fled to Morocco and one disappeared.
